catalog_content:
Item Name: Green Mini Hydrangeas - Mojito - 40 Stems Product Description:

Hydrangeas are a flowering plant or shrub that originated in Eastern Asia. It is also known as Hortensia or Grandmother's Flower. Its flowers naturally come in blue, green, pink, red, and white. Hydrangeas can also be tinted and/or painted.

These hydrangeas are natural a brilliant shade of Green, offering the possibilities to create fabulous centerpieces, bouquets, or any floral decor. This shade is perfect for baby showers, themed birthday parties, and other special occasions.

All of our hydrangeas are sustainably grown in Ecuador and Colombia and arrive with detailed care guides.

Care & Handling Guide:

  1. Remove the flowers from the box by cutting any straps located on the outside and inside of the box.
  2. Fill clean containers with at least 5 - 6 inches of fresh, cool water.
  3. Remove any leaves that fall below the waterline. Not removing the leaves may shorten the flower’s life.
  4. Using sharp scissors or a knife, cut the stems diagonally approximately one inch under running water if possible.
  5. Immediately after cutting, place the stems in the prepared containers. /lil>
  6. Keep the flowers away from direct sunlight, drafts, or excessive heat/cold.
  7. Change the water and re-cut the stems every 3 days

Value: nan Unit: None
overall_summary: These green mini hydrangeas are positioned as a mid-range decorative floral product, ideal for events like baby showers and themed parties. The 40-stem quantity suggests a balanced unit size for bouquets or centerpieces, offering affordability without compromising quantity. Sustainably sourced from Ecuador and Colombia, the product emphasizes eco-friendly production, which can justify a slightly higher price point for environmentally conscious buyers. The absence of premium branding or certifications suggests a standard market positioning, catering to general consumers rather than luxury buyers.
